content: Ai is going places. Not sure where but definitely places
XD Ts made my day real funny
Sorry your pfp was so cute I was distracted
How are we on this fine night
It is currently the afternoon and my day is going quite alright, how about you kind.. Sir?
Sadly ther are no cookie emojis in Mori server
In ur opinion should I use ramona or karen hmmm
Since ryker and horla also provide arith right?
I do not have g ramona
they provide different things but id say karen
ramona is great but not really the best with kath
yeaa agreed i’m a bit biased against karen cuz i found it hard to charge up karen exalt but theoretically she brings better synergy with the arith, u can probs solve the aliemus problem with relics
it might’ve also been a skill issue on my part
u can never have too much synergy, tho yea like u said ur probs not gonna be using her cards much just relying on her exalt for an extra resource
also horla doesn’t rlly “give” arith, her joy stance lets u retain cards and leftover arith but if u use up the arith it’s not like it’ll carry over
also the good thing abt horla is she can flexibly switch stances
Even when angry, you're still the cutest femboy of the server
I guess Aurora likes clanker (I can't say it because I might get banned)
Cyclone hit town and wrecked the signal tower and destroyed electricity for 2 whole days
Couldn't play anything but now it's back up
Yeah I was in my house when it hit
There were also TWO earthquakes in the span of two days
God threw a temper tantrum but now he's lwk chill
If you ever have any questions, you should ask him, his wisdom is vast
I think he's mad because he remembers the time we crucified his son
I might ask him why he likes that
It means I understand the weakness of flesh
